_meta.data_integrity_note: PIPELINE DATA EMPTY — No active campaigns, attribution logs, weekly candidates, or daily collector findings provided. Analysis cannot proceed.

analyst_briefing: REASONING HALTED: The structured intelligence data required for attribution chain reasoning (persistent-state.json, active_campaigns registry, attribution_log entries, weekly_new_campaigns, daily_collector_findings) was not provided. The pipeline data object contains only empty arrays and four below-threshold items that do not meet the Tier 3+ evidence threshold for campaign-level analysis. Without active campaign registries, attribution logs, or candidate campaigns with source-verified evidence, no attribution confidence reviews, linkage detections, actor posture assessments, or cross-monitor escalation flags can be generated. To proceed with this analytical task, provide: (1) active_campaigns array with campaign IDs, current confidence levels, and attribution_log references; (2) weekly_new_campaigns with dedupe_keys and source URLs; (3) daily_collector_findings with Tier 1-3 source verification; (4) actor_tracker data showing operational tempo or doctrine changes. The four below-threshold items (HCSS overview, ENISA-EEAS framework study, FIMI Technology Ltd. commercial products, London FIMI forum) are correctly excluded per quality standards — they contain no specific actor attribution, campaign details, or Tier 3+ verified evidence suitable for FCW analysis.
